ololand.description: OloLand M&A intelligence — 39 tools for deal analysis, financial valuation (DCF/LBO/Monte Carlo), risk assessment, forensic QoE, document search, knowledge graph, market intelligence, cross-deal learning, voice (talk-to-deal), competitive strategy simulation (war game), corp dev workflows (build-vs-buy, acquisition thesis, batch triage), CRE underwriting (stress test, debt sizing), conversation sessions, workflow orchestration, and report generation.
